steps.action: Open / in isolated browser session after clearing cookies/localStorage/IndexedDB
steps.expected: Welcome screen loads from clean state

steps.observed: Navigated to http://127.0.0.1:5173/onboard/handshake and handshake screen rendered
Navigated to http://127.0.0.1:5173/onboard/complete with password + confirm password + Save & Launch Signer

steps.action: Submit Save & Launch Signer with matching password fields
steps.expected: Reach dashboard, or welcome with onboarded profile visible if lock behavior applies
steps.observed: Navigated to http://127.0.0.1:5173/ showing returning-user profile row ('My Signing Key ... Unlock'), satisfying contract's locked-profile acceptance path

summary: Tested 1 assertion (VAL-CROSS-004): pass. End-to-end Onboard flow progressed Welcome -> Enter Package -> Handshake -> Onboarding Complete -> Welcome returning-user state with onboarded profile row visible (accepted final state per contract).
